plot.description: A Hi-C plot object from plotHicSquare or plotHicTriangle on which to annotate pixels

data.description: A string specifying the BED file path, a dataframe in BED format, or a GenomicRanges GRanges object specifying domain ranges

half.description: A character value specifying which half of hic plots to annotate

linecolor.description: A character value specifying the color of the domain annotations

params.description: An optional plotgardener pgParams object containing relevant function parameters
